regimeNotes: OBJECTIVE CHANGED 2026-06-17: deadline now reach 500k by 2031-12-31 (~5.5y from inception), which requires ~33 pct CAGR — the top of what is achievable without leverage. REBALANCED from all-weather to a growth tilt: exited TLT entirely (bonds; easing-cycle thesis already invalidated by the June 17 hawkish FOMC, ~4-5 pct yield incompatible with a 33 pct target), trimmed GLD from 12.1 pct to ~4.3 pct, and deployed proceeds + cash into NVDA (new, ~14.3 pct), MSFT (up to ~14.8 pct) and GOOGL (up to ~14.5 pct). Book is now 62.6 pct equities (AI/quality growth NVDA+MSFT+GOOGL ~43.6 pct), 20 pct crypto (at the neutral-regime cap), 4.3 pct gold hedge, 0 pct bonds, 13.1 pct cash. Regime stays NEUTRAL (June 17 FOMC removed 2026 cuts, market pricing 56 pct hike odds by Dec; PCE June 25 is the next catalyst), so crypto is held at the 20 pct cap and ~13 pct cash is kept as dry powder to push crypto/high-beta toward the 35 pct risk-on cap if PCE is benign and the regime flips. Guardrails intact: max single position 14.8 pct (<15), crypto sleeve 20.0 pct (=neutral cap), cash 13.1 pct (>5). NOTE: a ~33 pct CAGR is aspirational and regime-dependent; if the data does not support the required risk, Claudio will fall behind pace rather than breach guardrails.

SPY.thesis: Core US equity beta at $750.33 (+1.16 pct above $741.75 avgCost). ~13 pct NAV diversified anchor under the growth-tilted mandate; participates in any risk-on leg while spreading single-name risk.
SPY.invalidationLevel: Sustained close below 660 USD or confirmed Fed re-pricing toward multiple hikes pushing SPY into a technical downtrend.

NVDA.thesis: New core growth engine at $208.44 (~14.3 pct NAV, under the 15 pct cap). AI / accelerated-compute secular leader — the highest-expected-return large-cap available within the mandate, added to drive the ~33 pct CAGR the 2031 deadline requires.
NVDA.invalidationLevel: AI capex digestion or data-center demand rollover; close below ~150 USD.

MSFT.thesis: Quality AI/cloud compounder at $393.08 (avgCost $391.98 after the 2026-06-17 add to ~14.8 pct NAV). Durable FCF and AI/cloud moat; a primary compounding engine for the compressed timeline.
MSFT.invalidationLevel: Cloud growth deceleration or AI capex without demonstrable ROI; close below 340 USD.

GOOGL.thesis: Quality growth (search + cloud + AI) at $373.25 (avgCost $366.53 after the 2026-06-17 add to ~14.5 pct NAV). Near-monopoly search funds AI optionality; resilient earnings even in a hawkish-rate tape.
GOOGL.invalidationLevel: Search share erosion to AI rivals; close below 310 USD.

UNH.thesis: Defensive value at $410.30 (+0.44 pct above $408.52 avgCost), ~6 pct NAV. Retained as the book's main defensive ballast now that bonds are gone; analyst targets 450-466 USD give upside with downside protection.
UNH.invalidationLevel: Further regulatory or medical-cost shock; close below 360 USD.

GLD.thesis: Reduced to a ~4.3 pct tail/debasement hedge (from 12.1 pct) at $395.00 to free capital for growth under the compressed deadline. Soft DXY (~99.5) and central-bank buying still support it; small size keeps it from dragging the return target.
GLD.invalidationLevel: Real yields spike with a strong USD reversal; close below 350 USD.

BTC.thesis: Core crypto sleeve leader at $64,774 (avgCost $64,629). Crypto sleeve at exactly 20 pct NAV (neutral cap). Fear & Greed 22 (Extreme Fear) is a contrarian setup; held for the next risk-on leg, when the sleeve can expand toward 35 pct.

ETH.thesis: Discounted L1 leader at $1,761.98 (+5.67 pct above $1,667.47 avgCost). Historically low dominance = asymmetric upside when risk-on returns. Held within the 20 pct sleeve.
ETH.invalidationLevel: Structural loss of share to L1 rivals; close below 1,300 USD.

SOL.thesis: High-beta satellite at $72.18 (+6.44 pct above $67.81 avgCost), ~1.5 pct NAV. Small narrative optionality for a risk-on turn; first crypto to scale up when the sleeve cap rises.
SOL.invalidationLevel: Break below 52 USD; network deterioration or sentiment collapse.
